title.ko: 특정변량을 위해서 특별히 적용되지 않는 측정; 단일의 다른 서브클래스에 속하지 않는 둘 이상의 변량을 측정하는 장치; 요금계량장치; 특정변량을 위해서 특별히 적용되지 않는 설비의 이동 또는 도입; 달리 분류되지 않는 측정 또는 시험
title.en: MEASURING NOT SPECIALLY ADAPTED FOR A SPECIFIC VARIABLE; ARRANGEMENTS FOR MEASURING TWO OR MORE VARIABLES NOT COVERED BY A SINGLE OTHER SUBCLASS; TARIFF METERING APPARATUS; TRANSFERRING OR TRANSDUCING ARRANGEMENTS NOT SPECIALLY ADAPTED FOR A SPECIFIC VARIABLE; MEASURING OR TESTING NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDED FOR

definition.ko: 측정 장치 일반 순시치 이외의 데이터 회복 G01D1/00 특별한 목적을 위한 준비를 가지는 것 G01D3/00 특정 변량을 위해 특히 적합한 설비를 이동 또는 도입 G01D5/00 구성요소 G01D11/00 지시; 지시기 부품 G01D7/00, G01D13/00 기록; 기록기의 부품 G01D9/00, G01D15/00 시험 또는 교정 G01D18/00 달리 분류되지 않는 측정 또는 시험 G01D21/00 요금의 계량 G01D4/00

title.ko: 변량의 순간값이 아닌 일반적 적용의 결과값을 주는 측정장치(3/00이 우선; 요금계량장치 4/00; 특정변량을 위해서 특별히 적용되는 것이 아닌 변환기 5/00)
title.en: Measuring arrangements giving results other than momentary value of variable, of general application (G01D0003000000 takes precedence;in tariff metering apparatus G01D0004000000;transducers not specially adapted for a specific variable G01D0005000000)

title.ko: 평균값, 예. 자승평균의 평균값의 지시(전류 또는 전압의 자승평균의 평균값의 측정 G01R 19/02)
title.en: giving mean values, e.g. root mean square values (measuring root mean square values of currents or voltages G01R0019020000)

title.ko: 적분값의 지시(평균값의 지시 G01D 1/02)
title.en: giving integrated values (giving mean values G01D0001020000)
by intermittent summation
over fixed periods of time
giving differentiated values
giving a maximum or minimum of a value
giving a distribution function of a value, i.e. number of times the value comes within specified ranges of amplitude
giving a value which is a function of two or more values, e.g. product or ratio

title.ko: 불특정의 파라미터가 미리 결정된 값을 초과한 것을 신호하는 장치를 갖는 것(G01D 1/14가 우선)
title.en: with arrangements for signalling that a predetermined value of an unspecified parameter has been exceeded (G01D0001140000 takes precedence)
Measuring arrangements with provision for the special purposes referred to in the subgroups of this group
with provision for altering or correcting the transfer function
for range change; Arrangements for substituting one sensing member by another
mitigating undesired influences, e.g. temperature, pressure
affecting incoming signal, e.g. by averaging; gating undesired signals
on measuring arrangements themselves
with provision for operation by a null method
with provision for safeguarding the apparatus, e.g. against abnormal operation, against breakdown
with provision for switching-in of additional or auxiliary indicators or recorders

title.ko: 요금계량장치(택시미터에 관한 것 G07B 13/00; 액체, 가스 또는 전기를 계량 제어 분배하는 코인, 카드 또는 그와 유사한 것에 의해 구동되는 장치G07F 15/00)
title.en: Tariff metering apparatus (in taximeters G07B0013000000;apparatus actuated by coins, cards or the like with meter-controlled dispensing of liquid, gas, or electricity G07F0015000000)

title.ko: 세부
title.en: Details
Resetting-mechanisms, e.g. for indicating members

title.ko: 구동부재, 지시 부재간의 클러치기구, 예, 히스테리 시스 클러치(G01D 4/04가 우선)
title.en: Arrangement of clutches between driving and indicating member, e.g. of hysteresis clutch (G01D0004040000 takes precedence)
Transfer of indication from a counter into a summing counter
Maximum indicating or recording apparatus, i.e. where the tariff for a period is based on a maximum demand within that period
Apparatus for indicating or recording progressive maximum
Fixed-demand indicating or recording apparatus, i.e. where indication is made when a predetermined quantity has been consumed during a time interval greater or less than a predetermined time interval
Apparatus for indicating or recording maximum or minimum load hours
Apparatus for indicating or recording overconsumption with opposing torque which comes into effect when a predetermined level is exceeded, e.g. subtraction meters

title.ko: 감지 부재의 출력을 전달하기 위한 기계적 수단; 감지 부재의 형태 또는 특성이 변환 수단을 제한하지 않는 다른 변수로 감지 부재의 출력을 변환하기 위한 수단; 특정 변수에 특히 적합하지 않은 변환기 (G01D3/00이 우선; 변수의 순간값 이외의 결과를 주는 장치에 특히 적합한 것 G01D1/00)
title.en: Mechanical means for transferring the output of a sensing member; Means for converting the output of a sensing member to another variable where the form or nature of the sensing member does not constrain the means for converting; Transducers not specially adapted for a specific variable (G01D0003000000 takes precedence;specially adapted for apparatus giving results other than momentary value of variable G01D0001000000)

definition.ko: 그룹 G01D5/02 ~ G01D5/54는 주요한 수단으로 구분됩니다. 따라서, 최종 표시를 위한 다른 수단의 단순한 적용은 분류에 영향을 주지 않습니다.

title.en: using mechanical means
using levers; using cams; using gearing
acting through a wall or enclosure, e.g. by bellows, by magnetic coupling
Reducing the effects of friction, e.g. by applying vibrations
Applying external forces to increase force available for operation of indicating or recording part

title.ko: 전기적 또는 자기적 수단을 이용하는 것 (G01D5/06이 우선)
title.en: using electric or magnetic means (G01D0005060000 takes precedence)
influencing the magnitude of a current or voltage
by varying resistance
by relative movement of a point of contact and a resistive track
by varying effective impedance of discharge tubes or semiconductor devices
by varying inductance, e.g. by a movable armature
differentially influencing two coils
by varying capacitance
by relative movement of capacitor electrodes
by varying output of an electrodynamic device, e.g. of a tachodynamo
influencing the phase or frequency of AC
influencing characteristics of pulses or pulse trains; generating pulses or pulse trains
using a variable number of pulses in a train
by varying the duration of individual pulses
using time shifts of pulses
by varying pulse repetition frequency
using pulse code
Selecting one or more conductors or channels from a plurality of conductors or channels, e.g. by closing contacts
one conductor or channel
a combination of conductors or channels

title.ko: 광학적 수단을 사용한 것, 즉 적외선, 가시광선 또는 자외선을 사용하는 것
title.en: using optical means, i.e. using infrared, visible or ultraviolet light

title.ko: 광 빔의 편향을 가지는 것. 예. 직접적인 광학적 지시용(G01D 5/40이 우선)
title.en: with deflection of beams of light, e.g. for direct optical indication (G01D0005400000 takes precedence)
the beams of light being detected by photocells

title.ko: 광 빔의 전부 또는 일부를 차폐하는 것 또는 감쇠에 의한 것(G01D 5/40이 우선)
title.en: with attenuation or whole or partial obturation of beams of light (G01D0005400000 takes precedence)
the beams of light being detected by photocells
using displacement encoding scales
influencing the transmission properties of an optical fibre
Forming the light into pulses
by diffraction gratings
Scanning a visible indication of the measured value and reproducing this indication at a remote place, e.g. on the screen of a cathode-ray tube
specially adapted for use with infrared light
using fluid means
using jets of fluid
by deflecting or throttling the flow

title.ko: 파 또는 입자방사에 의한 수단을 사용하는 것(5/26이 우선)
title.en: using wave or particle radiation means (G01D0005260000 takes precedence)
derived from a radioactive source
detected by a counter tube

title.ko: 그룹 G01D 5/02, G01D 5/12, G01D 5/26, G01D 5/42 및 G01D 5/48 중 2이상에 속하는 수단을 사용하는 것
title.en: using means specified in two or more of groups G01D0005020000, G01D0005120000, G01D0005260000, G01D0005420000, and G01D0005480000

definition.ko: 두 개 이상의 특정 수단이 조합된 경우에는 서브그룹 G01D5/56 ~ G01D5/62 중 적용가능한 최초의 것이 그 외의 그룹에 우선함.

title.en: using electric or magnetic means
using optical means, i.e. using infrared, visible or ultraviolet light
using fluid means
using wave or particle radiation means not covered by group G01D0005580000
Indicating measured values
Indicating value of two or more variables simultaneously
using a separate indicating element for each variable
Luminous indications projected on a common screen
using a common indicating element for two or more variables
giving indication in co-ordinate form
Audible indication of meter readings, e.g. for the blind

title.ko: 측정치의 기록
title.en: Recording measured values
Producing one or more recordings of the values of a single variable
with provision for multiple or alternative recording
Multiple recording, e.g. duplicating
giving both graphical and numerical recording
the recording element, e.g. stylus, being controlled in accordance with the variable, and the recording medium, e.g. paper roll, being controlled in accordance with time
recording occurring continuously
with provision for altering speed of recording medium in accordance with the magnitude of the variable to be recorded
recording occurring at separated intervals, e.g. by chopper bar
recording element actuated only upon change in value of variable
the recording element, e.g. stylus, being controlled in accordance with time and the recording medium, e.g. paper roll, being controlled in accordance with the variable
recording occurring continuously
recording occurring at separated intervals, e.g. by chopper bar
either the recording element, e.g. stylus, or the recording medium, e.g. paper roll, being controlled in accordance with both time and the variable

title.ko: 각각 두 개 이상의 변수값으로 이루어진 하나 이상의 기록을 생산하는 것 (G01D9/38, G01D9/40이 우선)
title.en: Producing one or more recordings, each recording being of the values of two or more different variables (G01D0009380000, G01D0009400000 take precedence)
there being a separate recording element for each variable, e.g. multiple-pen recorder
there being a common recording element for two or more variables
the variables being recorded in predetermined sequence
in separate columns

Producing one or more recordings, each recording being produced by controlling the recording element, e.g. stylus, in accordance with one variable and controlling the recording medium, e.g. paper roll, in accordance with another variable

Producing one or more recordings, each recording being produced by controlling either the recording element, e.g. stylus, or the recording medium, e.g. paper roll, in accordance with two or more variables
Recording indications of measuring instruments by photographic means, e.g. of counters

title.ko: 특수한 변량에 특별히 적용되어지는 것이 아닌 특정장치의 구성부품(G01D 13/00, G01D 15/00 우선)
title.en: Component parts of measuring arrangements not specially adapted for a specific variable (G01D0013000000, G01D0015000000 take precedence)
Bearings or suspensions for moving parts
Knive-edge bearings
Strip or thread suspensions, e.g. in tension
Elements for balancing moving parts
Elements for damping the movement of parts
using fluid damping
using magnetic induction damping

title.ko: 부품의 운동을 제지 또는 방해하기 위한 소자, 예. 지침에 영위 되돌리기용(불사용시에 있어서 가동부의 쇄정(鎖錠) G01D 11/20)
title.en: Elements for restraining or preventing the movement of parts, e.g. for zeroising (caging of moving parts when not in use G01D0011200000)

title.ko: 스프링(G01D 11/06이 우선)
title.en: Springs (G01D0011060000 takes precedence)
Caging devices for moving parts when not in use
automatically actuated
Housings
Windows; Cover glasses; Sealings therefor
Structurally-combined illuminating devices
Supports specially adapted for an instrument; Supports specially adapted for a set of instruments

title.ko: 특수한 변량에 특별히 적용되어지는 것이 아닌 특정장치의 표시기 구성부품
title.en: Component parts of indicators for measuring arrangements not specially adapted for a specific variable

title.ko: 눈금판; 다이얼
title.en: Scales; Dials

title.ko: 구조
title.en: Construction

title.ko: 가동대(G01D 13/10이 우선)
title.en: Moving bands (G01D0013100000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 회전통(G01D 13/10이 우선)
title.en: Rotating drums (G01D0013100000 takes precedence)
with adjustable scales; with auxiliary scales, e.g. vernier
Graduation
for rotations of more than 360°
with staggered markings
with raised or recessed markings
with luminescent markings
Pointers, e.g. settable pointer
for indicating a maximum or minimum
adapted to perform a further operation, e.g. making electrical contact
with luminescent markings

title.ko: 특수한 변량에 특별히 적용되어 지는 것이 아닌 측정장치의 기록부의 구성부품
title.en: Component parts of recorders for measuring arrangements not specially adapted for a specific variable

title.ko: 기록체 표면을 기계적으로 변화시키거나 또는 기록체 표면에 구멍을 뚫는 스타일러스 또는 다른 기록소자 (프린팅기록소자 G01D 15/20)
title.en: Styli or other recording elements acting to mechanically deform or perforate the recording surface (printing recording elements G01D0015200000)
acting to punch holes in the recording surface
Electric recording elements, e.g. electrolytic
for spark erosion
Heated recording elements acting on heat-sensitive layers
Magnetic recording elements
Optical recording elements; Recording elements using X- or nuclear radiation

title.ko: 기록체 표면에 기록제, 예. 잉크를 옮기는 기록소자(프린팅 기록소자 G01D 15/20)
title.en: Recording elements transferring recording material, e.g. ink, to the recording surface (printing recording elements G01D0015200000)
Nozzles emitting recording material
Recording elements for printing with ink or for printing by deformation or perforation of the recording surface, e.g. embossing
Chopper bars for bringing recording element into contact with recording surface
Drives for recording elements or surfaces, not covered by group G01D0005000000
operating by clockwork
Holding means for recording surfaces; Guiding means for recording surfaces; Exchanging means for recording surfaces
for foldable strip charts
for circular charts
Recording surfaces

title.ko: 그룹 G01D 1/00 - G01D 15/00에 제공된 장치 또는 설비의 시험 또는 측정
title.en: Testing or calibrating apparatus or arrangements provided for in groups G01D0001000000-G01D0015000000
Measuring or testing not otherwise provided for
Measuring two or more variables by means not covered by a single other subclass
